untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific chart patterns (Head-and-Shoulders, Left Shoulder, Head formation, Right Shoulder positioning, Abandoned Baby candlestick pattern) which cannot be expressed using only price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivot, Volume, and bar property indicators. These require either multi-candle pattern recognition logic or custom pattern detectors not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using abandoned baby proxy (small body_pct < 2%) and 38% retracement approximation (returns < -0.38) with pivot-based exit as symmetry target. However, the core Head-and-Shoulders pattern with shoulder/head positioning cannot be reliably expressed without dedicated pattern recognition indicators.
